raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX transaction of {$5800.00} at XXXX for a 2 month vacation rental for my XXXX son so he'd not be homeless while in another part of the state for training program. Posted to account on XX/XX/XXXX. 

Soon realized this is a FAKE and scam listing ; there is NO actual address to stay at! Also, my son and I both got harassing phone calls AND texts over and over from foreign people I think in XXXX XXXX. The number is a KNOWN SCAMMER PHONE NUMBER you see when going on the internet to look up the phone number.

They demanded we or I go to an outside portal and RE enter all my personal info including my credit card. I immediately contacted XXXX and they could not understand basic English. Did not even know the word " mom ''

when trying to say I had booked for my son as his mom. I had to wait on Citi Thankyou credit card ( long time customer ) for the charge to post to dispute it. So I did that and then put in a dispute for services not rendered and they were not beause you you can't stay at A NON EXISTENT ADDRESS! Today Citi says they have come to the conclusion I still ow this! and they read nothing I sent them! I was told by customer service today at Citi they can't even see attachements in emails but the dispute people say to email them ALL proof! It seems like they do not read and now I know they do not. Multiple people have issues with Citi finding in favor of the merchant and doin g XXXX actual investigation to help their customers.

This is not ok. I already booked a vacation rental w/ the same credit card because that first one on XXXX did not exist and he still needed a place to live for 2 months ... so I now ow for TWO 2 month rentals on my credit card because Citi left the XXXX charge on my account /card. 

This is going to ruin my credit and has put me in debt. It also made my XXXX  son drink heavily to the point of literally drinking himself to death soon. He feels immense guilt that he caused this by needing a place. 
Today XX/XX/XXXX Citi card re added this charge and reversed their initial temp removal to do the investigation which they never actually do for their customers.
